items.claim: McGregor's delusional mindset will negatively impact his performance in this fight.
items.quote: McGregor is delusional going into this fight and that his delusion is going to work against him

items.claim: McGregor has a history of substance abuse issues.
items.quote: He's had a a well-known drug addiction, right? I mean, that that's been labeled across everywhere and he's admitted to it.

items.claim: McGregor suffered a severe leg injury against Dustin Poirier involving a snapped bone and a metal implant.
items.quote: his bone was snapped in half and he has a metal pole in his leg.

items.claim: Max Holloway will defeat Conor McGregor via knockout within the first three rounds.
items.quote: my official prediction is that Max Holloway wins this fight via knockout. My official prediction is that it comes within the first three rounds
